title: Heff (Lepi)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Heff |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'' |species=[[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]]{{GamerCite|4|The Starhoppers of Aduba-3}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=[[Tebbi]] |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Yeah, Heff's dead. Even a bacta bath wouldn't help.''"
"''Yep, yep. Sad ta see an oldster make da Final Jump.|Two locals discuss Heff's death|}} '''Heff''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]] who emigrated to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] on one of the original [[Colony ship/Legends|colony ships]] that settled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the early period of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].Heff is stated to be a survivor of the "original colony ships", however Tatooine was first colonized in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]. It is more likely Heff is a survivor of the wave of colonists that arrived around [[85 BBY/Legends|85 BBY]]. As Lepi lifespan extends to around 100 years, this is the most likely arrival period. There, he set up a shop known as [[Heff's Souvenirs]], which he ran with his daughter [[Tebbi]]. Heff lived to be one of only three remaining colonists from those early [[Starship/Legends|ships]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Heff was killed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jodo Kast]] who shot him in the neck with a [[Sennari/Legends|sennari]]-[[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] dart. Kast was seeking the Rebel sympathizer [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] who had been hiding out on the planet for many [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Kast slowly killed off all those that may have been alive when Tallon arrived to ensure they couldn't pass on any information to competing hunters. Upon his [[Death/Legends|death]], Tebbi—herself a Rebel sympathizer—shared what she could with a group of Rebels that were also [[Escape from Tatooine|seeking]] Tallon. After a couple of seasons, she sold Heff's Souvenirs to the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Moplin Jarron]].''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' ==Behind the scenes== Heff and his daughter were described in ''Tatooine Manhunt'' as "rabbit-like alien[s]." The name "Heff" was later used in the ''The Starhoppers of Aduba-3'' article as an example of a Lepi name, and in this manner his [[Species/Legends|species]] was revealed. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|7|Passages}} {{Mo}} *''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'' {{Reprint|Tatooine Manhunt}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' *{{GamerCite|4|The Starhoppers of Aduba-3}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Businesspeople]] [[Category:Lepi]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Tatooinians]]
